title: Late Interaction Basics | Qdrant Multi-Vector Search
summary: Late interaction is a search paradigm that preserves token-level representations while enabling pre-computation of documents, contrasted against single-vector embeddings and cross-encoders. The video explains how late interaction models like ColBERT balance retrieval speed with relevance precision for large-scale collections.
